Notice Of And Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff CHRISTINE BUI, Tel No. 415-283-9884 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court finds Plaintiff did not properly inform the opposing side of her intent to appear at hearing to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LUZ VASQUEZ'S motion to quash service of summons and the complaint is granted. Plaintiff's opposition papers disclose that the purported substitute service was not in conformance with the requirements of the Code of Civil Procedure. Plaintiff is encouraged to seek assistance from the Court's self-help center to learn the requirements for service of a summons and complaint and also to file an amended complaint that is written in clear and easy to understand language. The prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff CHRISTINE BUI, Tel No. 415-283-9884 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court finds Plaintiff did not properly inform the opposing side of her intent to appear at hearing to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LUZ VASQUEZ' demurrer is off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion to quash. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
